criteria.name: AI Personalization
criteria.description: The degree to which the app provides personalized product recommendations and shopping experiences based on user data, preferences, and shopping history.

criteria.name: Multimodal AI capabilities
criteria.description: Ability to combine data from multiple sources (e.g., text, images) to provide a comprehensive shopping solution.

criteria.name: Platform Integration
criteria.description: Seamless integration with e-commerce platforms (e.g., Shopify, BigCommerce) and physical stores for omnichannel support.

criteria.name: Customer Support
criteria.description: Availability of 24/7 customer support and AI-driven assistance for product searches, queries, and issue resolution.

criteria.name: Ease of Use
criteria.description: Intuitive interface and minimal setup required for both customers and businesses.

criteria.name: Cost Saving Features
criteria.description: AI features that help save money, such as finding deals, discounts, and best prices effortlessly.
